metadata.name: ww-input-date-time-picker
metadata.description: A configurable date/time picker supporting single date, date range, and multi-date selection, with datetime/date/time/month/year modes, locale and timezone handling, custom trigger and action slots, and optional multi-calendar and flow behaviors.
features: Single, range, and multi-date selection modes
Datetime, date, time, month, and year modes
Custom trigger zone slot (fully stylable) and action-select button slot
Multi-calendar range display with independent or linked calendars
Range modes: free, auto (fixed span), and minmax (enforced min/max span)
Locale-aware formatting (pageLang or explicit lang) and timezone support
Configurable date/time format with custom unicode format support
Customizable flow step order for the picker UI
Left and right sidebar slots for extra actions/filters
Programmatic actions: clear value, open menu, close menu

properties.name: initValueSingle
properties.description: Initial value when `selectionMode` is `single`. ISO date string, e.g. `"2021-03-11T10:11:20.000+00:00"`. Inactive when selectionMode is not 'single'.

properties.name: initValueRangeStart
properties.description: Initial range start when `selectionMode` is `range`. ISO date string. Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range'.

properties.name: initValueRangeEnd
properties.description: Initial range end when `selectionMode` is `range`. ISO date string. Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range'.

properties.name: initValueMulti
properties.description: Initial values when `selectionMode` is `multi`. Array of ISO date strings. Inactive when selectionMode is not 'multi'.

properties.name: advancedColors
properties.description: Editor toggle that reveals the advanced color theme properties (border, scrollbar, hover icon/text, success, danger, highlight, etc.). When false, only the basic color theme properties are shown in the editor — but advanced color properties can still be set programmatically.

properties.name: advancedStyles
properties.description: Editor toggle that reveals the advanced sizing theme properties (border radius, cell size/padding, menu min width, preview font size). When false, only the basic style properties are shown in the editor — but advanced style properties can still be set programmatically.

properties.name: advancedDates
properties.description: Editor toggle that reveals the advanced date constraints (preventMinMaxNavigation, ignoreTimeValidation, allowedDates, disabledDates, disabledWeekDays). When false, only the basic date constraints are shown in the editor — but advanced ones can still be set programmatically.

properties.name: enableCalendarOnly
properties.description: Render the calendar inline without a trigger. When true, the `triggerZone` slot is bypassed.

properties.name: stickedDatePicker
properties.description: Render the menu at trigger level instead of teleporting to the document body. Useful inside pop-ups.

properties.name: calendarOnlyFit
properties.description: Layout fit of the inline calendar (only when `enableCalendarOnly=true`). Inactive when enableCalendarOnly is false.

properties.name: enableLeftSidebar
properties.description: Show the `leftSidebarZone` slot to the left of the calendar. Ignored when `enableCalendarOnly=true`. Inactive when enableCalendarOnly is true.

properties.name: enableRightSidebar
properties.description: Show the `rightSidebarZone` slot to the right of the calendar. Ignored when `enableCalendarOnly=true`. Inactive when enableCalendarOnly is true.

properties.name: menuPosition
properties.description: Horizontal alignment of the picker menu relative to the trigger.

properties.name: selectionMode
properties.description: Selection mode. Determines which init value property is used and which date modes are available.

properties.name: dateMode
properties.description: Date/time mode. `time`, `month`, and `year` support only `single` and `range` selection modes (not `multi`).

properties.name: enableSeconds
properties.description: Show seconds in the time picker. Only applies when `dateMode` is `datetime` or `time`. Inactive when dateMode is not 'datetime' and not 'time'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when dateMode is not 'datetime' and not 'time'.

properties.name: use24
properties.description: Use 24-hour time format. Only applies when `dateMode` is `datetime` or `time`. Inactive when dateMode is not 'datetime' and not 'time'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when dateMode is not 'datetime' and not 'time'.

properties.name: multiDatesLimit
properties.description: Maximum number of dates selectable in `multi` mode. 0 means no limit. Inactive when selectionMode is not 'multi'.

properties.name: enableMultiCalendars
properties.description: Show multiple calendars side-by-side. Only applies when `selectionMode=range` and `dateMode` is `datetime`, `date`, or `week`. Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range' or dateMode is not in ['datetime', 'date', 'week'].

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range' or dateMode is not in ['datetime', 'date', 'week'].

properties.name: multiCalendars
properties.description: Number of calendars displayed (2-4, only when `enableMultiCalendars=true`). Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range', or dateMode is not in ['datetime', 'date', 'week'], or enableMultiCalendars is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range', or dateMode is not in ['datetime', 'date', 'week'], or enableMultiCalendars is false.

properties.name: multiCalendarsSolo
properties.description: Make the multiple calendars navigate independently (only when `enableMultiCalendars=true`). Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range', or dateMode is not in ['datetime', 'date', 'week'], or enableMultiCalendars is false.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range', or dateMode is not in ['datetime', 'date', 'week'], or enableMultiCalendars is false.

properties.name: rangeMode
properties.description: Range selection behavior (only when `selectionMode=range`). `free` = any span, `auto` = fixed span from `autoRange`, `minmax` = enforce `minRange`/`maxRange`. Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range'.

properties.name: enablePartialRange
properties.description: Allow selecting only the start of a range without the end (only when `rangeMode=free`). Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range', or rangeMode is not 'free', or (rangeMode is 'free' and enableCalendarOnly is true).

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range', or rangeMode is not 'free', or (rangeMode is 'free' and enableCalendarOnly is true).

properties.name: autoRange
properties.description: Number of days auto-selected after the start date (only when `rangeMode=auto`). Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range' or rangeMode is not 'auto'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range' or rangeMode is not 'auto'.

properties.name: minRange
properties.description: Minimum number of days in a range (only when `rangeMode=minmax`). Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range' or rangeMode is not 'minmax'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range' or rangeMode is not 'minmax'.

properties.name: maxRange
properties.description: Maximum number of days in a range (only when `rangeMode=minmax`). Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range' or rangeMode is not 'minmax'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range' or rangeMode is not 'minmax'.

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: Orientation of the picker when in range mode with multiple calendars.

properties.name: timezone
properties.description: IANA timezone for the picker (e.g. `"UTC"`, `"Europe/Brussels"`). `"locale"` uses the user's local timezone. Only applies when `dateMode=datetime`. Inactive when dateMode is not 'datetime'.

properties.name: enableFlow
properties.description: Enable step-by-step picker flow (e.g. pick month, then year, then day). Ignored when `enableMultiCalendars=true`. Inactive when enableMultiCalendars is true.

properties.name: flowSteps
properties.description: Ordered list of picker steps when `enableFlow=true`. Valid values: `month`, `year`, `calendar`, `time`, `minutes`, `hours`, `seconds`. Inactive when enableFlow is false.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Read-only state. Triggers the `readonly` element state when true.

properties.name: required
properties.description: Mark the input as required (HTML5 required attribute on the hidden validation input).

properties.name: lang
properties.description: Locale for the picker. `"pageLang"` uses the current page language; otherwise any locale key supported by date-fns (e.g. `"en"`, `"fr"`).

properties.name: format
properties.description: Display format for the selected date in the trigger's `preview`. Pick `custom` to use `customFormat`.

properties.name: customFormat
properties.description: Custom unicode date format string (only when `format=custom`). See https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr35/tr35-dates.html#Date_Field_Symbol_Table. Inactive when format is not 'custom'.

properties.name: autoApply
properties.description: Apply the selection immediately without requiring the action-select button. Ignored when `dateMode=time`. Inactive when dateMode is 'time'.

properties.name: closeOnAutoApply
properties.description: Close the picker menu after an auto-apply (only when `autoApply=true`). Inactive when autoApply is false or dateMode is 'time'.

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when autoApply is false or dateMode is 'time'.

properties.name: weekNumbers
properties.description: Display week numbers in the calendar. `"local"` uses locale rules, `"iso"` uses ISO 8601.

properties.name: weekStart
properties.description: First day of the week. `"0"`=Sunday, `"1"`=Monday, ..., `"6"`=Saturday.

properties.name: hideOffsetDates
properties.description: Hide dates from previous/next months that fall within the visible grid.

properties.name: minDate
properties.description: Earliest selectable date. ISO date string.

properties.name: maxDate
properties.description: Latest selectable date. ISO date string.

properties.name: preventMinMaxNavigation
properties.description: Prevent navigating beyond `minDate` / `maxDate` months. Inactive when advancedDates is false (advanced toggle in editor).

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when advancedDates is false (the editor's advanced-dates toggle is off).

properties.name: ignoreTimeValidation
properties.description: When comparing against `minDate` / `maxDate`, ignore the time portion. Inactive when advancedDates is false (advanced toggle in editor).

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when advancedDates is false (the editor's advanced-dates toggle is off).

properties.name: startDate
properties.description: Initially focused date when the picker opens without a value. ISO date string.

properties.name: disableMonthYearSelect
properties.description: Prevent the user from clicking the month/year header to navigate.

properties.name: allowedDates
properties.description: Explicit list of selectable dates (array of ISO date strings). Empty array means no allow-list. Inactive when advancedDates is false (advanced toggle in editor).

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when advancedDates is false (the editor's advanced-dates toggle is off).

properties.name: disabledDates
properties.description: List of non-selectable dates (array of ISO date strings). Inactive when advancedDates is false (advanced toggle in editor).

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when advancedDates is false (the editor's advanced-dates toggle is off).

properties.name: disabledWeekDays
properties.description: List of disabled weekdays. Array of strings `"0"` (Sunday) to `"6"` (Saturday). Inactive when advancedDates is false (advanced toggle in editor).

inactiveProperty.description: Inactive when advancedDates is false (the editor's advanced-dates toggle is off).

properties.name: noDisabledRange
properties.description: Allow ranges that span across disabled dates (only when `selectionMode=range`). Inactive when selectionMode is not 'range'.

properties.name: themeFontFamily
properties.description: Font family for the picker UI.

properties.name: themeFontSize
properties.description: Base font size for the picker UI.

properties.name: themeTimeFontSize
properties.description: Font size for the time picker digits.

properties.name: themeBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius for the picker UI. Inactive when advancedStyles is false.

properties.name: themeCellBorderRadius
properties.description: Border radius for individual day/month/year cells in the calendar grid. Inactive when advancedStyles is false.

properties.name: themePreviewFontSize
properties.description: Font size for the preview text shown in the trigger zone. Inactive when advancedStyles is false.

properties.name: themeMenuMinWidth
properties.description: Minimum width of the picker menu. Inactive when advancedStyles is false.

properties.name: themeCellSize
properties.description: Size (width and height) of each calendar cell. Inactive when advancedStyles is false.

properties.name: themeCellPadding
properties.description: Padding inside each calendar cell. Inactive when advancedStyles is false.

properties.name: themePrimaryColor
properties.description: Primary accent color (selected date background, focused controls).

properties.name: themeSecondaryColor
properties.description: Secondary color (secondary controls, inactive accents).

properties.name: themeBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the picker menu.

properties.name: themeTextColor
properties.description: Default text color inside the picker.

properties.name: themePrimaryTextColor
properties.description: Text color on top of the primary color (e.g. selected date text).

properties.name: themeHoverColor
properties.description: Background color on hover.

properties.name: themeDisabledColor
properties.description: Background color for disabled dates.

properties.name: themeHoverTextColor
properties.description: Text color shown on hover. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeHoverIconColor
properties.description: Icon color shown on hover. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeBorderColor
properties.description: Default border color used inside the picker UI. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeMenuBorderColor
properties.description: Border color of the picker menu. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeBorderHoverColor
properties.description: Border color on hover. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeScrollBarBackgroundColor
properties.description: Background color of the scrollbar inside the picker. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeScrollBarColor
properties.description: Scrollbar thumb color. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeSuccessColor
properties.description: Color used for success/valid states. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeSuccessDisabledColor
properties.description: Color used for success states when disabled. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeIconColor
properties.description: Default icon color in the picker (chevrons, navigation icons). Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeDangerColor
properties.description: Color used for danger/invalid states. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

properties.name: themeHighlightColor
properties.description: Color used to highlight ranges and the today marker. Inactive when advancedColors is false.

states.name: readonly
states.description: Active while the picker is in read-only mode (set by the `readonly` property).

events.name: change
events.description: Triggered when the selected value changes.

payload.value: string | { start: string, end: string } | string[] — shape depends on selectionMode (single / range / multi)

events.name: initValueChange
events.description: Triggered when the bound initial value changes externally.

payload.value: string | { start: string, end: string } | string[]

events.name: onFlowStep
events.description: Triggered when the user advances a step in flow mode (only when `enableFlow=true`).

actions.label: Clear
actions.description: Clear the current selection. For `single` resets to null, for `range` resets to `{ start: null, end: null }`, for `multi` resets to `[]`.

slots.name: triggerZone
slots.description: The clickable trigger that opens the picker menu. REQUIRED (unless `enableCalendarOnly=true`). Always generate children for this slot: a `ww-div` container (slot=triggerZone) that contains at least a `ww-text` whose text is bound to `context.item.data.preview` (with a fallback placeholder like 'Select a date...'). Optionally add a `ww-icon` alongside the text. Without this content, the picker has no visible input and is completely unusable.

slots.name: actionSelectElement
slots.description: Button shown at the bottom of the picker menu to confirm the selection. Required when `autoApply=false`. Typically a `ww-button`.

slots.name: leftSidebarZone
slots.description: Optional sidebar content shown to the left of the calendar. Only rendered when `enableLeftSidebar=true`.

slots.name: rightSidebarZone
slots.description: Optional sidebar content shown to the right of the calendar. Only rendered when `enableRightSidebar=true`.

variables.name: value
variables.description: The current selected value. Shape depends on `selectionMode`: for `single` a string (ISO date), for `range` an object `{ start, end }`, for `multi` an array of strings.

specifications: Only one of `initValueSingle`, `{initValueRangeStart, initValueRangeEnd}`, or `initValueMulti` is active at a time — it is selected by `selectionMode` (`single` / `range` / `multi`). Setting the others has no effect.
`dateMode` values `time`, `month`, and `year` only support `selectionMode` of `single` or `range` (not `multi`). The editor coerces `dateMode` to `datetime` when switching to `multi`.
`enableMultiCalendars`, `multiCalendars`, and `multiCalendarsSolo` only take effect when `selectionMode=range` and `dateMode` is `datetime`, `date`, or `week`.
`autoApply` is ignored when `dateMode=time`. When `autoApply=false`, the `actionSelectElement` slot MUST contain a button (typically `ww-button`) for the user to confirm the selection.
When `enableCalendarOnly=true`, the picker renders inline and the `triggerZone` slot is NOT shown; `calendarOnlyFit` then controls whether the inline calendar stretches or centers.

Inside the `triggerZone` slot the layout-item context exposes `context.item.data.preview` (formatted display string per `format` / `customFormat`) and `context.item.data.value` (the raw selected value). Use these to render the selected date(s) and a fallback placeholder.
`timezone` is only applied when `dateMode=datetime`. `"locale"` means 'use the browser/local timezone'.
`customFormat` only takes effect when `format="custom"`. Unicode tokens (Y/y, D/d, A/a) are normalized internally.

Advanced date constraints (`preventMinMaxNavigation`, `ignoreTimeValidation`, `allowedDates`, `disabledDates`, `disabledWeekDays`) are only surfaced in the editor behind an 'Advanced' toggle, but can be bound at any time.

Form-container caveat: this element does NOT currently register with `ww-form-container` via the `_wwForm:useForm` injection — when placed inside a form container, the form's submit payload will NOT include this field's value until the underlying component is updated. Read the exposed `value` variable directly for now.

examples.description: Single date picker with a custom trigger zone and an action-select button (autoApply disabled).
Date range picker with two linked calendars and minmax range mode.
